name: update_user
description: Update the authenticated user's profile attributes. Can change email, password, phone, and custom user metadata. Requires a valid JWT access token. Email changes trigger a confirmation email to the new address.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: New email address. A confirmation email will be sent to the new address.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: New password. Minimum 6 characters by default.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: New phone number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Custom user metadata to merge with existing metadata.
